medical_history.history_of_present_illness: This is a ___ woman in her USOH until the day of presentation when she sustained a fall in the setting of syncope onto her right lower extremity with immediate pain, inability to ambulate.

physical_examination.general_examination: A&O x 3 Calm and comfortable. Pelvis stable to AP and lateral compression. BLE skin clean and intact. RLE painful over lateral and medial malleolus. Thighs and leg compartments soft.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Saphenous, Sural, Deep peroneal, Superficial peroneal SILT ___ FHS ___ TA Peroneals Fire 1+ ___ and DP pulses Knee stable to varus and valgus stress.
